response:
My hands are actually shaking a little. I keep going over and over this in my head.

Okay. Harper flipped innocent. So we were wrong yesterday. And now Ellis—who pushed hardest against Harper—is dead. That means the Mafia is definitely among us four: me, Bailey, Dana, Jordan.

Let me look at this from every angle.

Dana is pointing at me, saying my nervousness is an act and that I benefited most from Harper's death. But I honestly thought Harper was suspicious—I wasn't trying to set anything up. Dana has been loud and chaotic from the start, which is consistent, but now they're aggressively targeting me while ignoring that Bailey has been almost completely neutral this whole game.

Jordan waited until the very last moment to vote Harper, only when it was inevitable. That's the kind of safe vote a Mafia member makes—going along with the crowd to avoid suspicion. And now Jordan is pointing at Dana while skimming over Bailey's complete invisibility.

Bailey... Bailey has been calm, measured, never really committed to anything strongly. That's the perfect Mafia strategy: stay in the background, let others fight, and pick off the loud ones at night. Ellis is dead—a loud voice. Harper is dead—a loud voice. Who's left? The quiet ones: me, Bailey, Jordan. And the loud one: Dana.

But I know I'm innocent. So if I'm innocent, the Mafia is Bailey, Dana, or Jordan. Between them, Dana has been consistently chaotic and is now targeting me specifically. Jordan's late vote still bothers me. But Bailey's total neutrality when everyone else has taken a side feels... calculated.

I think Bailey is the safest bet. Too neutral, too invisible, and now Ellis—one of the loudest anti-Harper voices—is dead. If Bailey is Mafia, they'd want to keep the chaos going while staying clean themselves.

**Dana** is targeting me aggressively while voting Finley. Dana's been chaotic all game, which is consistent with their personality, but now they're pushing hard against Finley while ignoring Bailey. The Doctor might protect Finley or Dana tonight since they're both vocal. But I have to take the risk.

night_result: Finley was killed by the Mafia.
